description: OBS-020 + OBS-017 — SLO burn rate per Google SRE Workbook 'Alerting on SLOs' chapter. Multi-window (1h, 6h) burn rate panels; alert thresholds at 2% budget burn over 1h (fast) and 5% over 6h (slow). Companion alert rules in infrastructure/prometheus/slo_alerts.yml.

panels.title: SLO burn rate — 1h window (fast alert ≥ 14.4)
panels.description: Burn rate = error rate / SLO error budget. 1h burn ≥ 14.4 → 2% budget consumed in 1h → fire critical alert (consumes monthly budget in ~2.5 days).

panels.title: SLO burn rate — 6h window (slow alert ≥ 6)
panels.description: Burn rate over a longer window catches sustained low-volume degradation that the 1h window misses. 6h burn ≥ 6 → 5% budget in 6h → page.

panels.title: Error budget remaining (30-day rolling) — target SLO 99.5%

options.content:
**1h burn ≥ 14.4** → burns ~2% of monthly error budget in 1 hour. Critical: monthly budget exhausted in ~2.5 days at this rate. Investigate immediately.

**6h burn ≥ 6** → burns ~5% in 6 hours. Page on-call. Likely sustained degradation; check recent deploys + dependency health.

**Both windows firing** → confirmed regression, freeze deploys, start incident.

See `docs/runbooks/slo-burn-rate.md` for full investigation steps.

title: Kaori — SLO Burn Rate
